creator: kristinacors
caption: If you’re planning a trip to the Hamptons, watch until the end for the name of the hotel! #travelbucketlist #luxuryhotels #thehamptons #besthotels #bridgehampton

transcription.text: Weirdest day in the Hampton. Did you know Martha Stewart literally planted trees here? So yeah, you can say this boutique hotel has iconic roots. And just like the trees, the design here is rooted in good taste. Let's just say you'll wanna shower twice a day for the aesthetic. After your 12 minute photo shoot in the bathroom mirror, you're gonna wanna migrate poolside where you can float like you have no responsibilities or lounge in the cabana or swing in the garden. Once you've floated your worries away, you can check out the spa for a massage or melt your stress in the sauna. By the way, another thing I love about this place is every suite is totally unique. So no tour design the same because of course, she's giving boutique not basic. Each room even comes with a fridge for your snacks and a safe for your secrets. So if you're looking for peace, plants, and a place that Martha Stewart personally blessed, the name of this place is A Room at the Beach. If you wanna book a hotel room, click on the green location tag and you can now book on TikTok directly through this video, just like with TikTok shop. And sometimes TikTok has better rates, so it's definitely worth checking before you book. Follow for more gems in the Hamptons and to see the world.
